final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style photo of a Korean cafe scene with coffee and dessert, overlaid with hand-drawn annotations.

Style/medium: needs a smartphone-shot Instagram aesthetic with hand-drawn white ink overlay — exact line weight and roughness is yours
Composition: needs a casual, social-media framing with intentional negative space for annotations — exact crop and angle is yours
Subject: must include a stylish coffee drink and dessert as focal elements, no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy daylight atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, muted Korean cafe direction — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean but slightly textured surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) with diary-style short comments for each element:
  - Drink: taste, temperature, mood (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘み)
  - Food: texture, deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、さいこう)
  - Space: atmosphere (e.g., リラックス、いい時間)
  - Overall: one-line summary (e.g., しあわせすぎる～)
  Decorations: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons — exact placement is yours
Constraints: must preserve white sketch-style thin lines, one-stroke rough uneven quality, outline tracing around objects, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance, must leave intentional blank space, must achieve Instagram story / magazine rough notes aesthetic, fashionable yet relaxed mood
Avoid: must avoid overcrowding, must avoid excessive decorations
